category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Inlyne as a GPU powered, browserless markdown and HTML viewer.
source_facts.description says it is a browserless tool to view markdown files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Inlyne.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, features, support, configuration, and FAQ.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Inlyne-Project/inlyne; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README lists browserless, GPU powered, basic HTML rendering, live code change, and CLI configuration.
source_facts.description identifies GPU-powered browserless markdown viewing.
source_facts.executables lists inlyne as a CLI executable.
